c53_verification.SWAY_Y_FREQ_declared: line 1082 — const SWAY_Y_FREQ = 0.17 * Math.PI * 2; // 1.068 rad/s (0.17 Hz)

known_open_issues.description: Skull prop (createSkull(), lines 647-657) is a decorative mesh with no ZONE_LORE entry, no hover interaction, and no Celtic narrative context. cranium (SphereGeometry 0.22,8,7) + jaw (BoxGeometry 0.28,0.12,0.22) placed at (9,-1.9,-9) — visible corner prop with zero lore signal.
known_open_issues.severity: LOW — cosmetic immersion gap only; no gameplay impact, no regression
known_open_issues.recommendation: Add skull to ZONE_LORE map with a short Druidic text (e.g., 'Crâne du Gardien — vestige du cycle précédent'). Alternatively add a hover highlight + tooltip matching the crystal/door zone pattern.

flat_shading.evidence: All procedural stone/wood/bone/candle/door/shelf/book/parchment/pedestal materials retain flatShading:true. Crystal omits it correctly with inline comment (C49). LairGLBAssets.ts applyFlatShading() called on sol_pierre GLB (line 223) and table_druidique. createSkull() boneMat has flatShading:true (line 649). No regressions introduced at C53.

z_fighting.evidence: mortarMat polygonOffset:true/factor:-1/units:-2 (procedural wall seams). sol_pierre GLB (lines 227-234): polygonOffsetFactor=-2/units=-4 applied per-mesh via traverse(), matching mur_pierre pattern — C112 closed. Y-lift 0.02u + polygonOffset dual guard is correct for 16-bit GPU depth precision at ~10u (~0.05u error). table_druidique at Y=-5.0 covered by same pattern. parchment rolls at Y=-4.8 sit above floor plane with no coplanarity risk.
z_fighting.problem: Score held at 9 (identical to C77, no regression, no new fix). Residual theoretical risk on Mali-T720/Adreno 306 not observable in headless test; polygonOffset mitigation is in place.

material_quality.evidence: pedestalMat: roughness=0.85, metalness=0.05 (C46). crystalMat: roughness=0.25, metalness=0.1, transparent, opacity=0.82, emissive=0x6030aa, emissiveIntensity animated (1.4 Hz pulse). stoneMat: roughness=0.95, metalness=0.0. LairDensity bookMats: 5 colour variants, roughness=0.8 each. createSkull() boneMat: roughness=0.7, metalness=0.0 — appropriate aged-bone read. All PBR params consistent with Celtic dungeon palette.

lighting_dramaturgy.evidence: setupLighting (lines 660-682): AmbientLight(0x1a1008,0.3) + HemisphereLight(0x2a3820,0x3a2a1a,0.25) + key PointLight(0xff6618,0.9,22) at [0,3,2] (forward-angled, depth shadows) + rim PointLight(0x6699cc,0.55,18) at [8,2,7] + fill PointLight(0xcc8833,0.4/0.55lowEnd,16) at [-9,0,-5] + backAccent PointLight(0xff5500,0.35,12) at [0,1.5,-11] (skipped lowEnd). LairDensity adds moonbeam SpotLight(0xb8d4ff,1.8). setupLighting comment correctly reads '6-source pass (degraded to 5 on low-end mobile)' — C52 BUG#1-C76 remains closed.

glb_coverage.evidence: Confirmed from C77 baseline: cauldron, bougie (×4 clones), table_druidique, mur_pierre, cristal_boule, sol_pierre all load via loadGLB() with isDisposed guards and fadeInGLB() integration. sol_pierre confirmed at LairGLBAssets.ts lines 219-239. No GLB slots removed or regressed at C53.

geometric_proportions.evidence: From C77: crystal SphereGeometry(0.7,16,12) at line 176 (C51 upscale). Cauldron SphereGeometry(0.65,10,8). Door proportions maintained. createSkull(): cranium SphereGeometry(0.22,8,7) scale.y=0.85 — correct oblong skull shape; jaw BoxGeometry(0.28,0.12,0.22) — appropriate jaw-to-cranium ratio. No geometry changes at C53.

bundle_gzip.evidence: C53 adds 2 const declarations (SWAY_X_FREQ/SWAY_Y_FREQ) and 1 const (floatSin) per rAF frame — net code size delta is ~+80 bytes pre-gzip, ~+30 bytes post-gzip (constants compress near-perfectly with surrounding arithmetic). No new imports, no new modules. Bundle delta is negligible. Score held at 9 (same as C77 — no measurement available for exact gzip size, maintained conservatively).
bundle_gzip.problem: None — delta is strictly positive (micro-optimization not a size regression).

fps_budget.evidence: C53 eliminates 4 multiplications/rAF frame (0.3*PI*2 × 2 and 0.17*PI*2 × 2 computed once at init vs. per-frame). floatSin cache eliminates 1 Math.sin call per frame (crystal sphere + GLB now share 1 call instead of 2). V8 cannot constant-fold across closure boundaries — hoisting is a real micro-optimization. Net change: -5 floating-point operations per rAF frame. No new scene objects, lights, or traversals added at C53.

memory_leaks.evidence: removeEventListener('keydown') confirmed at 28 locations across 14 minigame files (2 per file: endGame + cleanup — symmetric). isDisposed guards on all GLB loaders. lairDisposed guard on rAF update loop (line 1086). cancelHandles array manages fadeInGLB cancellables. No new listeners added at C53 (SWAY_X_FREQ/SWAY_Y_FREQ are const scalars — zero allocation).

feedback_zones.evidence: From C77: crystal, door, and all interactive props have hover highlighting via applyHoverTo(). crystalEntry.hovered drives emissiveIntensity branching (line 1112: 0.9 hovered / 0.5 unhovered, C113). ARIA aria-label dynamically updated after interactives[] built (C38). canvas tabindex=0 + auto-focus (C102). Skull is NOT an interactive zone — by design (no zone entry) — so no hover feedback expected or missing.
feedback_zones.problem: None in interactive zones. Skull intentionally non-interactive (see OPEN#1-C78 for lore gap).

mobile_touch.evidence: touchAction='none' on renderer.domElement (line 695) prevents mobile scroll interference. touchstart (passive:false) + touchend handlers registered at lines 1074-1075. lowEnd=true path skips backAccent PointLight, reducing GPU load on Mali-G57/Adreno 610 targets (C89-P2). fill intensity compensated +0.15 on low-end path. No C53 changes affect touch path.

keyboard_nav.evidence: keydown handler registered on renderer.domElement (line 1076). tabindex=0 + preventScroll auto-focus (lines 694-698). ARIA role=application + aria-label set (lines 692-693). mg_negociation ⌨ Prêt… indicator at line 416 covers WCAG 2.4.7 empty-window gap (C52). 28 removeEventListener('keydown') calls across 14 minigames — no asymmetric cleanup. mg_herboristerie line 345 confirmed.

scene_entry_flow.evidence: Entry cinematic (lines 1090-1094): cubic ease-out pull from z=10 to z=7 over ENTRY_CAM_DURATION (~1.2s). Camera sway blocked during cinematic (lines 1098-1105, entryCamDone guard). camera.position.x=0 and y=0.5 during cinematic — no lateral drift on entry. No change at C53 (SWAY_X_FREQ/SWAY_Y_FREQ referenced only inside entryCamDone=true branch).

hover_feedback.evidence: crystalEntry.hovered drives frame-accurate emissive branching (line 1112: 0.9 vs 0.5) — C113 fix prevents update loop from overriding applyHoverTo(). GLB crystal material synced via crystalGLBMat (line 1115). Crystal float animation shared via floatSin cache (C53 — correct, no visual change). Door and other zones use applyHoverTo() pattern per C77 baseline. No regression at C53.

lore_coherence.evidence: All interactive zones have ZONE_LORE entries matching Celtic/Druidic narrative register per C77. Crystal, cauldron, door, shelf, books — lore text confirmed stable. Skull is decorative-only (no lore entry) but does not corrupt existing lore coherence; it is simply absent from the zone system. The criterion scores the consistency of existing lore entries, not the completeness of prop coverage.
lore_coherence.problem: None in existing entries. Skull lore absence scored separately under celtic_immersion.

celtic_immersion.evidence: Scene palette (0x0d0a08 clear, warm amber key, cool moonbeam) is consistent with Breton/Celtic dungeon aesthetic. All named zones deliver Druidic lore text on interaction. LairDensity shelves, books, parchment rolls, moonbeam SpotLight add depth. createSkull() (lines 647-657) places a visible bone prop at (9,-1.9,-9) in a prominent corner — but has no ZONE_LORE entry and no hover interaction. A lone skull in a druid's lair is a natural Celtic memento-mori detail, but without any lore signal it reads as a placeholder to an attentive player. Score docked -1 (same as C77 open issue carry-forward).
celtic_immersion.problem: OPEN#1-C78 — skull prop has no ZONE_LORE entry. Recommendation: add tooltip 'Crâne du Gardien — vestige du cycle précédent' or equivalent Druidic text. Effort: ~10 lines.

summary.regressions: None — all C77 scores maintained or improved
summary.c53_impact: fps_budget: no regression confirmed; hoisting 5 FP ops/frame removed; floatSin eliminates 1 Math.sin/frame on hot path
open_issues: OPEN#1-C78 — skull prop no ZONE_LORE (carry from C77, LOW severity)

verdict_rationale: Global score 9.75/10 is above 9.0 threshold and above C77 baseline (9.69). No regressions. All C53 fixes verified closed (SWAY_X_FREQ/SWAY_Y_FREQ hoisted, floatSin cached). All C52 carry-fixes verified still closed (setupLighting comment, mg_herboristerie keydown, mg_negociation ⌨ Prêt…, 28 removeEventListener counts). Single open issue (skull lore) is LOW severity, carry from C77, no gameplay impact.

next_cycle_recommendations.action: Add skull to ZONE_LORE map with Druidic tooltip text (~10 lines). Closes OPEN#1-C78 and recovers +1 on celtic_immersion.
Measure actual gzip bundle size post-C53 to confirm bundle_gzip can be promoted from 9→10 with evidence.
next_cycle_recommendations.expected_score_impact: bundle_gzip 9→10 if measured delta < 0.5 KB gzip

next_cycle_recommendations.action: z_fighting score 9 is stable. No action required unless a new GPU target below 16-bit depth is introduced.
